mapper.sql: id, code, name, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.code, r.name, r.description, r.created_at, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role ur WHERE ur.role_code = r.code) AS member_count FROM sys_role r
AND (r.code LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR r.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR r.description LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY r.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (code, name, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO sys_role_permission (role_code, menu_key, actions) VALUES (#{rp.roleCode}, #{rp.menuKey}, CAST(#{rp.actions, typeHandler=com.zioneer.robotqcsystem.mapper.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb))
